config.script:
const sccv_put_value = 1
const PROP_FCONTROL_OPERATION = 1
const FCONTROL_OPERATION_DATE_TODAY = 1 const FCONTROL_OPERATION_DATE_CALENDAR = 2
function process_fcontrol(byref pPage,byref pHLI)
dim nOper : nOper = pHLI.prop(PROP_FCONTROL_OPERATION) dim pCtrl : set pCtrl = pPage.ctrl(pHLI.prop(PROPC_IDENT))
select case nOper case FCONTROL_OPERATION_DATE_TODAY 'today doc_.putctrlcmd pCtrl.ident,sccv_put_value,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) case FCONTROL_OPERATION_DATE_CALENDAR 'calender dim dtDate : dtDate = pCtrl.value if choose_date(dtDate) then doc_.putctrlcmd pCtrl.ident,sccv_put_value,dtDate end if end select
doc_.applyctrldata 'posted - will execute after this module finishes end function
function choose_date(byref dtDate) : choose_date = false dim pCalendarPage : set pCalendarPage = doc_.getmodule(THIS_FILE)
pCalendarPage.set_date(dtDate) pCalendarPage.set_global_date(dtDate)
if dtDate = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() then pCalendarPage.fill_calendar trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) else pCalendarPage.fill_calendar dtDate end if
redirect_ctrls pCalendarPage
doc_.pushpage pCalendarPage dim bRes:bRes = pCalendarPage.domodal() doc_.poppage dtDate = pCalendarPage.get_global_date choose_date = true end function
'data zwracana na zewnatrz dim g_date 'data potrzebna do zabawy w wyswietlanie dim oper_date
function fill_calendar(byref dtDate)
dim body:set body = page_.ctrl(500).body dim row,cell,ctrl
dim tab:set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(100)).removeall tab.section_head.removeall.getsection.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER
tab.section_body.removeall.getsection.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY
page_.ctrl(10).text = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dtDate)
'daty graniczne miesiąca dim min_date:min_date = dateserial(year(dtDate), month(dtDate) , 1) dim max_date:max_date = dateserial(year(dtDate), month(dtDate) + 1 , 0)
'aaaaaaaa 'offset - czyli ile od poniedzialku do pierwszego dnia miesiąca ' i od ostatniego do niedzieli dim down:down=WeekDay(min_date,vbMonday)-1 dim up:up=7 - WeekDay(max_date,vbMonday)
dim count_weeks:count_weeks= ((max_date+up)-(min_date-down) + 1)/7
dim iter_weeks dim iter_days dim curr_day:curr_day = 0 curr_day = min_date
'pierwszy tydzien
dim nWeek nWeek = DatePart("ww", dateserial(year(curr_day) , month(curr_day) , 1 ) , vbMonday) update_week_ctrl body , 1 , nWeek
for iter_days = 2 to 8 if iter_days<=down+1 then clear_day_ctrl body , 1 , iter_days else update_day_ctrl body, 1 , iter_days , curr_day,dtDate curr_day = curr_day + 1 end if next
'tygodnie do przedostatniego for iter_weeks = 2 to count_weeks - 1 for iter_days = 2 to 8 update_day_ctrl body, iter_weeks , iter_days , curr_day,dtDate curr_day = curr_day + 1 next update_week_ctrl body , iter_weeks , nWeek next
'ostatni for iter_days = 2 to 8 if iter_days>8-up then clear_day_ctrl body , iter_weeks , iter_days else update_day_ctrl body, iter_weeks , iter_days , curr_day,dtDate curr_day = curr_day + 1 end if next update_week_ctrl body , iter_weeks , nWeek
'czyscimy wszystko co jest ponizej ostatniego tygodnia for iter_weeks=5 to count_weeks step -1 set row = body.row(iter_weeks + 1) for iter_days = 1 to 8 clear_empty_week_ctrl body , iter_weeks + 1 , iter_days next next
page_.ctrl(11).text = MonthName(month(dtDate)) page_.ctrl(12).text = cstr(year(dtDate))
end function
function clear_empty_week_ctrl (byref body , nRow , nCell)
dim row:set row = body.row(nRow) dim cell:set cell = row.cell(nCell) dim ctrl:set ctrl = cell.element(1)
ctrl.text = ""
if nCell > 1 then ctrl.disable = true end if
cell.styleitem = STYLE_EMPTY_CELL cell.backcolor = rgb(R_BACK,G_BACK,B_BACK) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor
end function
function clear_day_ctrl(byref body , nRow , nCell)
dim row:set row = body.row(nRow) dim cell:set cell = row.cell(nCell) dim ctrl:set ctrl = cell.element(1) ctrl.text = "" ctrl.disable = true
cell.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY cell.border = clng(0)
cell.backcolor = rgb(R_DAY,G_DAY,B_DAY) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor
end function
function update_week_ctrl(byref body , nRow , byref nWeek)
dim row:set row = body.row(nRow) dim cell:set cell = row.cell(1) dim ctrl:set ctrl = cell.element(1)
if nWeek < 1 then nWeek = 1 end if
ctrl.text = cstr(nWeek) nWeek = nWeek + 1 cell.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY cell.border = clng(0) cell.backcolor = rgb(239,244,254) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor
end function
'update napisu i hli na kontrolce odpowiadajacej jednamu dniu function update_day_ctrl(byref body , nRow , nCell , value , dtDate) 'pierwsza kontrolka w kontrenerze dim row:set row = body.row(nRow) dim cell:set cell = row.cell(nCell) dim ctrl:set ctrl = cell.element(1)
ctrl.disable=false ctrl.text = cstr(day(value)) ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_DAY) = cstr(day(value)) ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_MONTH) = cstr(month(value)) ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_YEAR) = cstr(year(value))
cell.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_BODY cell.border = clng(0) cell.backcolor = rgb(R_DAY,G_DAY,B_DAY) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor
if value = dtDate then cell.backcolor= rgb(R_FOCUS,G_FOCUS,B_FOCUS) cell.backcolor2= cell.backcolor ctrl.focus = true end if
if value = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) then cell.backcolor= rgb(R_TODAY,G_TODAY,B_TODAY) cell.backcolor2= cell.backcolor end if
end function
function on_click(byref hli) g_date = dateserial(hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_YEAR) , hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_MONTH) , hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_DAY)) page_.goback end function
function get_global_date get_global_date = g_date end function
function set_global_date(dtDate) g_date = dtDate end function
function get_date get_date = oper_date end function
function set_date(dtDate) oper_date = dtDate end function
function minus_date_m dim dt:dt = get_date dim nDay:nDay = Day(dt) dim nMonth:nMonth = Month(dt)-1 dim nYear:nYear = Year(dt) 'if nMonth<1 then ' nMonth=12 'end if dt = dateserial(nYear,nMonth,nDay) set_date(dt) page_.ctrl(11).text = MonthName(month(dt)) fill_calendar dt end function
function plus_date_m dim dt:dt = get_date dim nDay:nDay = Day(dt) dim nMonth:nMonth = Month(dt)+1 'if nMonth>12 then ' nMonth=1 'end if dim nYear:nYear = Year(dt) dt = dateserial(nYear,nMonth,nDay) set_date(dt) page_.ctrl(11).text = MonthName(month(dt)) fill_calendar dt end function
function minus_date_y dim dt:dt = get_date dim nDay:nDay = Day(dt) dim nMonth:nMonth = Month(dt) dim nYear:nYear = Year(dt)-1 dt = dateserial(nYear,nMonth,nDay) set_date(dt) page_.ctrl(12).text = cstr(year(dt)) fill_calendar dt end function
function plus_date_y dim dt:dt = get_date dim nDay:nDay = Day(dt) dim nMonth:nMonth = Month(dt) dim nYear:nYear = Year(dt)+1 dt = dateserial(nYear,nMonth,nDay) set_date(dt) page_.ctrl(12).text = cstr(year(dt)) fill_calendar dt end function
private function redirect_ctrls(page) dim body:set body = page.ctrl(500).body dim row,cell,ctrl for each row in body for each cell in row for each ctrl in cell ctrl.customredirect CLng(600) next next next end function
function c600_ongetdata(ctrl) end function
function c600_ongotfocus(ctrl,nLostFocusId) dim cell:set cell = ctrl.parent cell.backcolor = rgb(R_FOCUS,G_FOCUS,B_FOCUS) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor dim dt:dt = dateserial (ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_YEAR),ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_MONTH),ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_DAY)) set_date(dt) page_.ctrl(10).text = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dt) end function
function c600_onlostfocus(ctrl,nGotFocusId) dim cell:set cell = ctrl.parent dim dt:dt = dateserial (ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_YEAR),ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_MONTH),ctrl.hli.prop(APPVAR_CALENDAR_DATE_DAY)) if dt = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) then cell.backcolor= rgb(R_TODAY,G_TODAY,B_TODAY) cell.backcolor2= cell.backcolor else cell.backcolor = rgb(R_DAY,G_DAY,B_DAY) cell.backcolor2 = cell.backcolor end if end function

thead.tr: XCALENDARHDRCELL() XCALENDARHDRCELL(P) XCALENDARHDRCELL(W) XCALENDARHDRCELL(S) XCALENDARHDRCELL(C) XCALENDARHDRCELL(P) XCALENDARHDRCELL(S) XCALENDARHDRCELL(N)

table.tbody: XCALENDARWEEKROW XCALENDARWEEKROW XCALENDARWEEKROW XCALENDARWEEKROW XCALENDARWEEKROW XCALENDARWEEKROW
